creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #1)
Do you mean update wrapper to last (3.5.26), own too old.
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/sysutils/javaservicewrapper/Makefile?view=markup
run testwrapper
If still problem exist, send result in this ticket:
http://sourceforge.net/p/wrapper/bugs/286/
Isn't too hard I can try create patch if it really problem for javaservicewrapper maintainer.
